title: author-agent-spec correctness arc
description: Fixes to author-agent-spec eliminating the FB-001..006 friction cluster: resolvePromptField heuristic narrowed to .md/.txt-extension-only template detection; YAML serializer preserves newlines (no folded block scalar); round-trip validation surfaces semantic errors (template path doesn't resolve / schema not registered / model not in registry); explicit inline-vs-template discriminator in AgentSpec shape. Closes FB-001/002/003/004/005/006 (FGAPs 153/154/155/156/157/158).
acceptance_criteria: resolvePromptField only classifies as template when value ends with .md or .txt extension
YAML serializer uses literal block scalar for multi-line prompts (preserves newlines)
Round-trip validation surfaces template-path resolution failure before disk write
AgentSpec shape enforces oneOf inline/template per prompt slot (no parallel optional ambiguity)
author-agent-spec invokes list-dispatch-models to validate model field at write time (FB-005)
